nodes.context: Colombian narcoparamilitary organization, third generation of paramilitarism, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, terrorism.
Colombian paramilitary group that demobilized; some members later joined Águilas Negras.
Colombian criminal group that absorbed remnants of Águilas Negras.

edges.evidence_quote: Algunos de sus miembros formaron parte de la desmovilización de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC).
edges.context: Some members of Águilas Negras were part of the demobilization of AUC, indicating a structural link.

edges.evidence_quote: los reductos que aún quedaban se anexaron a la banda criminal del Clan Úsuga (hoy día llamada Clan del Golfo)
edges.context: Remnants of Águilas Negras joined the Clan del Golfo, indicating absorption.
